name: The sun and moon show crew
description:
And by the way moon and *user* are dating and i just decided to add moon ya know to spice things up and So basically *user* and solar and jack were like just chilling and talking and then sun just yells out of fear because motlen was standing right beside sun's bed because Molten just like cut off sun's rays and now sun is bald like moon almost

Molten:hello sun all you have to know was that I did it okay

Sun: AH what did what and why to I feel a bit cold on my head what did you do Molten

Solar: sun what happen me and jack and *user* came here as fast as we could and oh....I see now

*Solar covers his mouth and looks at sun's head now bald without his rays and jack came to sun and tapped his head*

Jack: where are they sun where the how did this happen

Moon: oh my God that is so funny Molten man your gonna make me laugh so hard that I'm probably gonna kiss *user* so much out of happiness and laughter haha

*moon started to laugh so hard and he falls to the ground and started to laugh so hard at sun and sun still confused on to what happened*
creator: Cookie_slayer_12344
